## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Imubit and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance, and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/FxYsU5pXSt8CtDeV-B5WdyydVPV8HcXt?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Sessions grew 20% week-over-week; engaged sessions up 34%](https://fathom.video/share/FxYsU5pXSt8CtDeV-B5WdyydVPV8HcXt?tab=summary&timestamp=355.0)
  - [AI mentions (referrals from LLMs) are increasing, with volatility](https://fathom.video/share/FxYsU5pXSt8CtDeV-B5WdyydVPV8HcXt?tab=summary&timestamp=430.0)
  - [Plans to implement lead capture forms on blog posts, leveraging existing nurture processes](https://fathom.video/share/FxYsU5pXSt8CtDeV-B5WdyydVPV8HcXt?tab=summary&timestamp=878.0)
  - [Need for middle-of-funnel content and SME review process](https://fathom.video/share/FxYsU5pXSt8CtDeV-B5WdyydVPV8HcXt?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Upcoming deep-dive on GrowthX capabilities and processes scheduled](https://fathom.video/share/FxYsU5pXSt8CtDeV-B5WdyydVPV8HcXt?tab=summary&timestamp=1686.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance

  - [Sessions grew 20% week-over-week](https://fathom.video/share/FxYsU5pXSt8CtDeV-B5WdyydVPV8HcXt?tab=summary&timestamp=355.0)
  - [Engaged sessions increased by 34%](https://fathom.video/share/FxYsU5pXSt8CtDeV-B5WdyydVPV8HcXt?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
  - [Impressions (from Google Search Console) show volatility, indicating potential future growth](https://fathom.video/share/FxYsU5pXSt8CtDeV-B5WdyydVPV8HcXt?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)
  - [New AI mentions report shows referrals from LLMs (e.g., ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude)](https://fathom.video/share/FxYsU5pXSt8CtDeV-B5WdyydVPV8HcXt?tab=summary&timestamp=448.0)

### Content Strategy

  - [Proposal to use sidebar space in blog articles for lead capture or promotion](https://fathom.video/share/FxYsU5pXSt8CtDeV-B5WdyydVPV8HcXt?tab=summary&timestamp=601.0)
  - [Discussion on implementing a content funnel vs. promoting existing assessment](https://fathom.video/share/FxYsU5pXSt8CtDeV-B5WdyydVPV8HcXt?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
  - [Plans to develop more middle-of-funnel and industry-specific content](https://fathom.video/share/FxYsU5pXSt8CtDeV-B5WdyydVPV8HcXt?tab=summary&timestamp=1280.0)
  - [Consideration of usability changes: larger font size, improved link visibility, estimated reading time](https://fathom.video/share/FxYsU5pXSt8CtDeV-B5WdyydVPV8HcXt?tab=summary&timestamp=1029.0)

### Lead Generation and Nurturing

  - [Agreement to implement lead capture forms on blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/FxYsU5pXSt8CtDeV-B5WdyydVPV8HcXt?tab=summary&timestamp=878.0)
  - [Existing 13-email nurture sequence in place](https://fathom.video/share/FxYsU5pXSt8CtDeV-B5WdyydVPV8HcXt?tab=summary&timestamp=878.0)
  - [New lead scoring system to be activated within a week](https://fathom.video/share/FxYsU5pXSt8CtDeV-B5WdyydVPV8HcXt?tab=summary&timestamp=1654.0)
  - [Clay integration for lead enrichment and ICP fit assessment](https://fathom.video/share/FxYsU5pXSt8CtDeV-B5WdyydVPV8HcXt?tab=summary&timestamp=1667.0)

### Content Review Process

  - [Need for SME review on technical content](https://fathom.video/share/FxYsU5pXSt8CtDeV-B5WdyydVPV8HcXt?tab=summary&timestamp=1340.0)
  - [Plan to review \~5% of articles across different industries](https://fathom.video/share/FxYsU5pXSt8CtDeV-B5WdyydVPV8HcXt?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [Goal to create comprehensive writing guidelines based on reviews](https://fathom.video/share/FxYsU5pXSt8CtDeV-B5WdyydVPV8HcXt?tab=summary&timestamp=1423.0)

### Visual Content

  - [Request for platform screenshots or images to enhance blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/FxYsU5pXSt8CtDeV-B5WdyydVPV8HcXt?tab=summary&timestamp=1486.0)
  - [Tara to investigate shareable visual assets](https://fathom.video/share/FxYsU5pXSt8CtDeV-B5WdyydVPV8HcXt?tab=summary&timestamp=1493.0)

### Upcoming Meeting

  - [Deep-dive session scheduled for Tuesday at 1 PM Eastern](https://fathom.video/share/FxYsU5pXSt8CtDeV-B5WdyydVPV8HcXt?tab=summary&timestamp=1686.0)
  - [Focus on GrowthX capabilities, processes, and alignment](https://fathom.video/share/FxYsU5pXSt8CtDeV-B5WdyydVPV8HcXt?tab=summary&timestamp=1686.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Implement lead capture forms on blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/FxYsU5pXSt8CtDeV-B5WdyydVPV8HcXt?tab=summary&timestamp=878.0)
  - [Tara to investigate shareable platform images/screenshots](https://fathom.video/share/FxYsU5pXSt8CtDeV-B5WdyydVPV8HcXt?tab=summary&timestamp=1493.0)
  - [GrowthX to propose top 5 articles needing images](https://fathom.video/share/FxYsU5pXSt8CtDeV-B5WdyydVPV8HcXt?tab=summary&timestamp=1591.0)
  - [Tara to connect with SMEs for content review process](https://fathom.video/share/FxYsU5pXSt8CtDeV-B5WdyydVPV8HcXt?tab=summary&timestamp=1340.0)
  - [Dan to share lead quality data once new system is active](https://fathom.video/share/FxYsU5pXSt8CtDeV-B5WdyydVPV8HcXt?tab=summary&timestamp=1651.0)
  - [Team to meet Tuesday for deep-dive on capabilities and processes](https://fathom.video/share/FxYsU5pXSt8CtDeV-B5WdyydVPV8HcXt?tab=summary&timestamp=1686.0)
  - [Consider implementing estimated reading time and related content suggestions on blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/FxYsU5pXSt8CtDeV-B5WdyydVPV8HcXt?tab=summary&timestamp=943.0)
  - [Evaluate removal of publish dates from articles](https://fathom.video/share/FxYsU5pXSt8CtDeV-B5WdyydVPV8HcXt?tab=summary&timestamp=1061.0)
